message:
🐛 Fix Mission Explorer: show GitHub repo files instead of tab content (#4050)

Two issues fixed:
1. Tab content (Recommended/Installers/Fixes) was rendering on top of
   the directory listing when a GitHub repo was selected, hiding the
   files. Added filteredEntries.length === 0 guard to all three tabs.
2. Files clicked in the DirectoryListing were hardcoded to source
   'community', causing GitHub repo files to be fetched from
   console-kb instead of the GitHub API. Now detects source from
   selectedPath prefix.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
